arts.ttl: Forgotten Portsmouth defender provides update on his recovery from injury on same day Blues turn to Bristol City for help
arts.sum: Forgotten man Ibane Bowat has sent Pompey fans a reminder of his existence.

arts.ttl: Hull boss makes decision on apologetic former Portsmouth favourite following uncomfortable press conference ahead of Leeds game
arts.sum: Abu Kamara has been named in Hull City’s starting XI for their Championship fixture against Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Rob Atkinson's first words as a Portsmouth player as Bristol City boss explains defender's lack of game time at Ashton Gate
arts.sum: Rob Atkinson has spoken for the first time since completing his January switch to Pompey from Bristol City.

arts.ttl: Sunderland vs Portsmouth predictions: Black Cats set for more home success
arts.sum: Sunderland host Portsmouth in the Championship on Sunday and James Milton expects the Black Cats to enhance their excellent home record.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth fans to head to Sunderland on Sunday amid Met Office weather warnings for snow and freezing rain
arts.sum: Pompey fans heading to Sunderland on Sunday are advised to take note of the weather warnings that are in place for large parts of the country over the weekend.

arts.ttl: Transfer Gossip: Portsmouth to battle Oxford United and Derby County for Reading forward
arts.sum: Pompey could follow up their signing of Bristol City defender Rob Atkinson with a raid on Reading.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss reveals key set to accelerate January transfer arrivals at Fratton Park
arts.sum: John Mousinho has pinpointed the FA Cup as central to enabling Pompey’s January transfer signings.

arts.ttl: ‘We’re not making friends here’: Portsmouth boss’ message over making brutal squad call in January transfer window
arts.sum: John Mousinho admitted Pompey will deregister players again if necessary after the January window.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss John Mousinho explains decision behind loan arrival of Bristol City defender
arts.sum: John Mousinho believes Pompey have landed a ‘proven Championship centre-half’ following the transfer arrival of Rob Atkinson.

arts.ttl: Preview: Sunderland vs. Portsmouth - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Championship clash between Sunderland and Portsmouth, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
